## Description

What does this PR do? What problem does it solve?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the commit discipline (small logical units, < 500 LOC per commit)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles with `npm run typecheck` (zero errors)
- [ ] Tests pass: `npm test`
- [ ] Tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, AGENTS.md, HUMANS.md, or CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No console.log statements (logging goes to stderr only)

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number) (if applicable)

## Verification Steps

How can reviewers test this change?
